Latest Posts

  • 学习内容汇报

    假期学习内容汇报

    （一）学习并熟悉的内容

    截至2026.4.6，我学习并熟悉了

    • git与GitHub的使用方法与团队项目协作流程
    • godot中部分节点的建立与关联，GDscript基础语法与信号的连接
    • 基于Jekyll与GitHub Pages搭建简单的博客网页（这一段比较感兴趣所以试着做了，与项目内容无关）

  • Kiwifruit

    Kiwifruit (often abbreviated as kiwi), or Chinese gooseberry is the edible berry of several species of woody vines in the genus Actinidia.（测试）

  • Apples

    An apple is a sweet, edible fruit produced by an apple tree.（测试）

  • Bananas

    A banana is an edible fruit – botanically a berry – produced by several kinds of large herbaceous flowering plants in the genus Musa.（测试）
